titleStmt.title: SII 36.102: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 102. (A.R. No. 102 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the first prākāra in the Māgāḷēśvara temple, and at the end of the above record.

summary.p: A piece of land in the village of Chiruvēḷūr, measuring one [vēli] and 8 mā was granted as tax-free for providing food offerings (maṇavāḷappōnagam) to the silver images of Ātkoṇḍa Nāyakar and the goddess in the temple of Tirumāgāḷamuḍaiyār at Ambar in Ambar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu by Amudan Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyān alias Udayamārttaṇḍa Mūvēndavēḷār and Amudan Pañchanedivāṇan alias Mayiravāḷakulakālap Pallavaraiyan of Chiruvēḷūr in Paṉaiyūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu. The two images were installed in the temple by Piraman Muttan alias Udaiyamārthāṇḍa Mūvēndavēḷār, the father of the above two donors.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kulottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2 vatu [kṣatraya]śikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu panaiyūr nāṭṭu ciṟuveḷūr ciṟuveḷūruṭai
yān Amutan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānāna Utaiyamāttāṇṭa mūventaveḷānum Amutan pañcanetivāṇanāna mayiravāḷakulakālap pallavaraiyanum Ivviruvom Uyyak koṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Amparuṭaiyār tirumākāḷamuṭaiya [tribhuva*]na caṇṭecvara tevakanmikaḷukku nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyili ceytu nīrvāttu kuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷ pitākkaḷ piramanmuttanāna Utaiyamāttāṇṭa mūventaveḷār veḷḷiyāl Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Āṭkoṇṭanāyakaṟku Amutupaṭikkum meṟpaṭiyā reḻuntaruḷuvitta tirukkāmak koṭṭamuṭaiyāḷ tiruppaḷ
ḷiaraikku Eḻuntaruḷip pukkāl maṇavāḷap ponakamāka Amutu ceytaruḷukaikku nāṅkaḷ viṭṭa nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāna ciṟuveḷūr nilattil pavittiramāṇikka vatikku kiḻakku muṭikoṇṭacoḻa vākkālukku vaṭakku nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mūnṟāñcatirattu koṟṟamaṅkalat tellaikku meṟku kaṇṭac catira nilam Onṟe Eṭṭu māvukkum tiruvācalilponta cempon kuttalariciyum maṟṟu Eppe(r)ṟpaṭṭa kuṭimaiyum Innilattukku Iṟaiyili Antarāyakkācum Envaṅcattārum Ivvūranupavippārume Iṟuttu kuṭukkak kaṭavarkaḷāka cantirātittavaṟ śāsvatikamāka tiripuva
na caṇṭeśvara tevakanmikaḷukku Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom Amutan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānāna Utaiyamāttāṇṭa mūventa veḷānum Amutan pañcanetivāṇanāna mayiravāḷa kulakālap pallavaraiyanum .
Digital edition of SII 36.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
